questions.question: Explain the difference between supervised and unsupervised machine learning, providing examples of each.
questions.hint: Describe the characteristics and applications of both types

questions.question: Which of the following is a major challenge in developing a reliable and efficient machine learning system?
questions.hint: Refer to common challenges in machine learning

questions.question: Describe the machine learning process, including data preprocessing, model selection, training, and evaluation.
questions.hint: Focus on the key stages of the process
